texto: The situation of those men in the hierarchy of gender who avail themselves of female tenderness is not thereby altered: Their superordinate position is neither abandoned, nor their male privilege relinquished. The vulnerability these men exhibit is not a prelude in any way to their loss of male privilege or to an elevation in the status of women.
explicacao: Citação de Sandra Lee Bartky sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The situation of those men in the hierarchy of gender who avail themselves of female tenderness i…” articula reflexao, feminism, oppression em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e luto.
